summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of the Aspen Gqeberha Water Digital Twin. All 9 backend pytest cases pass (auth gate, site info, BAU supply/demand, true-cost breakdown, BAU projection, scenario with defaults, scenario sensitivity, initiatives). Model numbers match spec (2025 true cost 335.62 R/kl, 2050 BAU 753.46 R/kl, default scenario cumulative savings R2.61bn within R2.5-3bn range). Frontend: password gate (wrong → error, correct → unlock), Overview (hero + 4 KPIs + site + risks), BAU tab (stacked chart with reference lines), True cost tab (pie + 4 breakdown cards + tariff table), Simulator tab (3 sliders + 2 toggles + projection chart + 4 KPI cards + 5 initiative cards), live slider update (rainwater 10→25 bumps savings R2.61bn → R3.03bn), Savings tab (chart + 3 summary cards), sign-out returns to gate. Standalone HTML at /standalone.html gates on password, renders 5 tabs and 4 Chart.js canvases, and wrong password shows error.

issues: Checkbox <input> for Smart metering and Desalination toggles is visually hidden (switch style). is_visible() on the raw input returns false; clicks must go through the label. Toggle still works but consumers of data-testid on the input should click the enclosing label or use force click.

Keyboard ArrowRight did not move the first range slider value (stayed at 10 after focus+10× ArrowRight). Mouse drag likely works (React build works fine) but keyboard accessibility on the standalone range may need review.

action_items: Optional: move data-testid from hidden <input type=checkbox> to the outer <label class='switch'> so is_visible() works for toggles.
Optional: verify standalone.html range sliders are keyboard-focusable (tabindex / keydown handler) for accessibility.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses `os.environ['MONGO_URL']` / `os.environ['DB_NAME']` at import time but never uses the db — harmless for this demo but dead code; consider removing the Mongo client since no persistence is needed, or wire up log persistence.
`@app.on_event('shutdown')` is deprecated in FastAPI; prefer lifespan context manager.

Scenario floor logic in server.py lines 323-326 only applies when `desalination_on` is True AND all sliders at default minimums — the strat-cost floor to STRAT_TRUE_COST[y] will never apply in the default UI state (desal off). Intentional, but worth documenting.
Frontend App.js is 742 lines — consider splitting Gate, Overview, BauTab, TrueCostTab, SimulatorTab, SavingsTab into separate files (per guidelines >700 lines should split).
`useEffect` with empty-ish dep array disables ESLint rule but the `run` closure captures state; acceptable here, but debounce logic lives in two effects which is slightly duplicated.
seed_data_creation: None - app uses in-code static model data from Aspen Model v6.xlsm
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_aspen_api.py with 9 pytest cases covering all /api/aspen/* endpoints and /api/auth/login. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_aspen_api.py -v. All model numbers validated against client spec: 2025 true cost 335.62, 2050 BAU 753.46, default-scenario cumulative savings R2.61bn. Simulator toggles inputs are visually hidden; test via label click. Standalone HTML also gates on 'aspen2050' and renders 4 Chart.js canvases across 5 tabs.
